name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Self-contained sequential app workflow plugin for constitution truth, research waves, approved plan microtasks, dev-stage functional graphs, task ledgers, packet contracts, role-matched handoffs, and app-analyze reuse-quality audits.

interface.shortDescription: Sequential constitution, research, plan, graph, dev, analysis, and reuse audit workflow.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides a self-contained application workflow: app constitution as functional source of truth, research waves that explain constitution ids, approved sequential plan microtasks, a functional graph that models future app-dev work after planning, graph-linked task ledgers, versioned handoff packet contracts, role-matched sequential handoffs, read-only instruction hardening, and app-analyze lineage plus file reuse-quality audit. The plugin artifacts do not depend on a specific host workspace instruction file, runtime service, role inventory, or validation script.
capabilities: Research waves mapped to constitution ids
Dev-stage functional graph from approved plan microtasks
Implementation analysis with exact broken links
defaultPrompt: Create or update the app constitution functional truth.
Research and plan a wave with constitution refs.
Model plan microtasks in the graph and analyze lineage.
